title: oxycoccoides erythrocarpus
intro: Oxycoccoides erythrocarpus, also known as the red berry or mountain cranberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxycoccoides erythrocarpus include its potential to help alleviate digestive issues, urinary tract problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Oxycoccoides erythrocarpus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
